short_description: EHR login fails after forced password reset
description: Frank Schultz unable to log into Theranest EHR after overnight forced password reset. Login loops without error message.

short_description: Occupational Therapy scheduling software timing out on participant search
description: Scheduling module freezes for 30+ seconds when searching participant names with special characters.

short_description: Printer in Occupational Therapy gym not responding to print jobs
description: HP LaserJet in Occupational Therapy gym room 104 offline - participant exercise handouts cannot be printed.

short_description: Professional documentation portal returning 500 error
description: Theranest documentation module returns internal server error on session note save for MT state forms.

short_description: MCWC Program dashboard slow to load - Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group iPad
description: Marcus Yee reports MCWC Chronic Pain Program handouts taking 15+ seconds to load on Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group iPad. BRC wifi signal in room 104 is weak.

short_description: Badge access intermittently failing - therapy wing east door
description: Staff ID badges intermittently not recognized by east wing door participant. Affects after-hours access.

short_description: REDCap login failure for pilot users
description: Frank Schultz and Marcus Yee unable to authenticate to REDCap for Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group data entry. Password reset not resolving.

short_description: Wi-Fi dropping in Occupational Therapy gym and therapy rooms east
description: Wireless connection dropping every 20-30 min in rooms 102-106. Affects remote coaching and iPad usage.

short_description: Professional note templates corrupted after software upgrade
description: Theranest v12.1 upgrade corrupted custom goal measure and NRS template fields. All custom fields showing as blank.

short_description: remote coaching platform one-way audio - participant cannot hear therapist
description: Zoom Health platform microphone not transmitting in room 108. Reader hears silence. Workaround: use phone call.

short_description: Shared drive access denied - new Occupational Therapy staff cannot access templates
description: Jasmine Park (Level II fieldwork student) denied access to Occupational Therapy template folder on shared drive.

short_description: Timeclock software not saving hourly entries
description: ADP time clock entries from last Thursday are missing - Friday payroll entry gap for 4 staff members.

short_description: Therapy supply ordering portal down - cannot place equipment order
description: Patterson Medical online ordering portal returning 404. Need to order splinting materials by end of week.

short_description: VPN issues - cannot access BRC network from remote fieldwork site
description: Jasmine Park unable to connect to BRC VPN from University Occupational Therapy building to submit fieldwork hours.

short_description: Conference room projector not connecting to laptop via HDMI
description: Room 201 projector fails to detect HDMI input from Mac laptops. Affects weekly team meeting presentations.

short_description: REDCap data export timing out for Bitterroot Chronic Pain Group dataset
description: REDCap batch export of 150+ goal measure records failing with timeout. Data required for MTOTA Q4 report.

short_description: Outlook email not syncing on BRC workstation - room 104
description: Marcus Yee reports Outlook calendar not syncing since Monday. Meeting invites from MCWC Chronic Pain Program Team not appearing.

short_description: Reader scheduling portal in maintenance window - unannounced
description: Theranest scheduling went offline 7am without IT notice. Three new participant slots cannot be booked.

short_description: New Occupational Therapy workstation imaging delayed - needed for fieldwork student
description: IT imaging for the new iMac in room 106 delayed 3 days. Jasmine Park needs it for documentation by Monday.

short_description: Hand grip dynamometer calibration app install blocked by policy
description: JAMAR dynamometer calibration software installation blocked by endpoint security policy on Occupational Therapy workstation.
